content.problemStatement: Given a non-negative integer $N$, repeatedly sum its digits until the result has only one digit.
content.inputFormat: - The only line of input contains a single a non-negative integers $N$.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Sum of digits of 38: 3 + 8 = 11 

Sum of digits of 11: 1 + 1 = 2

Hence the result is 2.
